diff: The maximum amount of USDS that can be sent to the Avalanche ALM Controller via SkyLink (`LIMIT_LAYERZERO_TRANSFER`, hashed with Avalanche USDS OFT address and Avalanche destination domain) is specified in the document herein.
summary: Add Avalanche Asset Recovery Address To Safe Harbor
description: Adds Avalanche's chain ID and Asset Recovery Address to the Safe Harbor list.
